Guy Benson (@guypbenson)

The Virginia terrorist had previously been *convicted of trying to join ISIS.* He was not given the maximum sentence, then was released early. He was not denaturalized or deported. He repaid this leniency by shooting up a room, shouting Allahu Akbar. What the hell are we doing?

All it took was a freaking TERRORIST ATTACK in her state to change her tune

We’ve ALL been saying this was going to end up happening.
